en: This insurance policy complies with all additional PSC Disposal Facility Vendor requirements. Such coverages shall: be AM Best Rated A VII (except for Environmental, which shall be AM Best Rated A X); include PSC and its Client as Additional Insureds, without regard to the liabilities contained in this Agreement; be primary to any other insurance maintained by PSC or its Client; contain a waiver of subrogation in favor of PSC and its Client; contain a Severability of interest and/or cross liability provision; and provide Thirty (30) days notice to PSC in the event of any nonrenewal, cancellation, restriction, or modification of insurance. Disposal Facility agrees to furnish insurance certificates, showing Disposal Facility's compliance with this Section, prior to the provision of Services. PSC Disposal Vendor Insurance Requirements
Upload a Certificate of Insurance or other supporting documentation for this policy.
